trending_videos.title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more

trending_videos.description: The Wildcats (5-15) play the Hoosiers (9-11) in the Big Ten Tournament second round at the United Center. Forward Nick Martinelli leads the offense, averaging 22 points, while forward Tucker DeVries defends the home court from imminent attack.

trending_videos.title: P1Harmony (피원하모니) - ‘UNIQUE’ MV
trending_videos.description:
P1Harmony (피원하모니) - ‘UNIQUE’ MV

[Apple Music] : https://music.apple.com/us/album/unique-ep/1878335259
[Melon] : https://www.melon.com/album/detail.htm?albumId=12914348
[Spotify] : https://open.spotify.com/album/71EVZx82GopCyTNRZVkZSk

그룹 P1Harmony (피원하모니)가 아홉 번째 미니 앨범 ‘UNIQUE’로 컴백했다. 

미니 9집 ‘UNIQUE’는 파업을 선언했던 HERO 피원하모니가 다시 영웅으로 복귀하기까지의 여정을 그린 앨범이다. 결국 영웅일 수밖에 없는 운명을 지닌 피원하모니는 고민과 선택의 과정을 거치며 성장하고, 또 성숙해진다. 신보에는 스스로가 영웅임을 받아들이며 성장해 나가는 HERO 피원하모니의 서사가 담겼다. 

동명의 타이틀곡 ‘UNIQUE’는 Brazilian Funk 특유의 강렬한 사운드와 묵직한 드럼 비트가 돋보이는 곡이다. 컨셉추얼한 트랙과 중독적인 후렴구는 Crew에 대한 넘치는 자신감을 여과 없이 보여 주며, 함께하는 것만으로 무엇도 두려울 것이 없다는 단단한 유대의 메시지를 담은 가사를 통해 P1Harmony만의 역동적인 에너지를 전한다. 

이 곡의 에너지와 메시지는 퍼포먼스를 통해 더욱 입체적으로 확장된다. Brazilian Funk 특유의 그루브 위에 피원하모니만의 개성이 어우러진 퍼포먼스는, 핸드 사인으로 시작되는 인트로부터 몰입도를 끌어올린다. 또한 아프로 댄스를 기반으로 한 안무는 파워풀하면서도 절제된 무드로 곡의 매력을 극대화한다. 특히 후렴구 ‘My crew UNIQUE’ 파트에서는 멤버들이 직접 참여한 동작과 개성 있는 제스처가 더해져, 피원하모니만의 독보적인 색을 또렷하게 드러낸다.

‘UNIQUE’ 뮤직비디오는 운명을 받아들이고 각성하는 피원하모니의 모습을 중심으로 그려진다. 영웅의 귀환을 주제로 다루지만, 정의감 넘치

trending_videos.title: Official Launch Trailer | Crimson Desert
trending_videos.description:
Reclaim power. Reach beyond. The fight for Pywel begins on March 19, 2026 (GMT/PT) on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, Steam, Mac and Epic Games Store.

Pre-load on PlayStation Store, Xbox Store, Microsoft Store, and Steam starts March 17 at 22:00 GMT / 15:00 PT.

Join Kliff the Greymane as he embarks across the continent of Pywel to rebuild what has been lost and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ancient ruins and the mystery of the Abyss, explore the lands and forge your path through battles and discovery in this open-world action-adventure.
(The footage captured in this trailer was captured on PC.)

Pre-order Crimson Desert:
» Steam: https://pearlabyss.info/lteno
» PlayStation Store: https://pearlabyss.info/ps_store
» Xbox Store: https://pearlabyss.info/xbox_store
» Epic Games Store: https://pearlabyss.info/epic_store

About Crimson Desert  
Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Pearl Abyss. A devastati

trending_videos.title: Big 12 Tournament: BYU vs. West Virginia
trending_videos.description: AJ Dybantsa and the Cougars (22-10) play the Mountaineers (18-13) in the Big 12 Tournament second round. BYU beat Kansas State 105-91 behind Dybantsa's 40 points. West Virginia is fresh off a 77-62 win against UCF. Both teams seek the trophy.

trending_videos.title: Thrash | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
When a Category 5 hurricane decimates a coastal town, the storm surge brings devastation, chaos and something far more frightening: hungry sharks. Directed by Tommy Wirkola and produced by Adam McKay (Don’t Look Up), the film stars Phoebe Dynevor, Djimon Hounsou and Whitney Peak. THRASH is only on Netflix, April 10.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82650122

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Thrash | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

When a catastrophic hurricane slams a coastal town, stranded residents must survive rapidly rising waters swarming with ravenous sharks.

gaming.description: Gaming content, particularly related to popular games like Fortnite, continues to capture significant attention on YouTube.
gaming.insight: The 'Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2: Showdown | Cinematic Trailer' is likely receiving high engagement due to the game's large fanbase and the anticipation for new content.
gaming.opportunity: Creators can capitalize on this trend by producing content related to popular games, including gameplay, reviews, and updates.

sports_content.description: Sports-related videos, such as tournament highlights, are trending.
sports_content.insight: Videos like 'Italy vs. Mexico', 'Big Ten Tournament: Northwestern vs. Indiana', and 'Big 12 Tournament: BYU vs. West Virginia' indicate strong interest in live sports and tournament coverage.
sports_content.opportunity: Channels can increase engagement by providing behind-the-scenes content, athlete interviews, and expert analyses.

entertainment.description: Trailers for movies and TV shows are popular.
entertainment.insight: Videos such as 'Disclosure Day | Official Trailer', 'Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair | Official Trailer | Hulu', and 'Thrash | Official Trailer | Netflix' show a significant interest in upcoming entertainment releases.
entertainment.opportunity: Entertainment channels can focus on exclusive interviews, behind-the-scenes content, and fan reaction videos to leverage this interest.

music.description: Music videos continue to draw attention.
music.insight: The presence of 'P1Harmony (피원하모니) - ‘UNIQUE’ MV' suggests that music videos, especially from K-pop artists, are highly engaging.
music.opportunity: Creators can explore music reaction videos, song explanations, and fan engagement activities to boost viewership.

news_and_politics.description: News and political commentary remain relevant.
news_and_politics.insight: Videos like 'Hannity' highlight the ongoing interest in political content and news analysis.
news_and_politics.opportunity: Channels can explore in-depth analysis, opinion pieces, and expert discussions to maintain viewer interest.

multi-category_engagement.description: Creators and channels that diversify into multiple content categories tend to reach wider audiences.
multi-category_engagement.insight: Top channels like Fortnite and FS1 are engaging audiences by diversifying their content offerings.

brand_association.description: Associating with well-known brands or franchises increases visibility.
brand_association.insight: Videos associated with established brands such as Fortnite, Hulu, and Netflix are trending, indicating the power of brand association.

cross_promotion.description: Leveraging cross-promotion between related content (e.g., sports and gaming) can maximize audience reach.
cross_promotion.actionable_strategy: Creators can collaborate with other influencers or channels to produce crossover content that appeals to multiple interests.

audience_interaction.description: Engaging directly with audiences through comments, live streams, and community posts enhances viewer loyalty.
audience_interaction.actionable_strategy: Encourage creators to actively engage with their audience to build a strong community and increase viewer retention.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
